assignments.noCurrent: This employee is not currently assigned to any workplace.
assignments.endConfirm: End the current assignment without replacement?
assignments.dialogAssignDescription: Select the workplace where this employee works.
assignments.dialogReassignDescription: The current assignment will be closed automatically when you select a new one.
assignments.noWorkplacesAvailable: No active workplaces yet. Add one from a company first.

acceptInvite.title: Welcome to Buzomed
acceptInvite.intro: {inviter} has invited you to join {tenant} as {role}. Fill in the details below to activate your account.
acceptInvite.emailHelp: This email was used for the invitation and cannot be changed.
acceptInvite.successMessage: Your account has been activated. You will be redirected to the sign-in page.
acceptInvite.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
acceptInvite.errorInvalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
acceptInvite.errorInvalidName: Please fill in your first and last name.
acceptInvite.errorAlreadyFinalized: This account has already been activated. Please sign in.
acceptInvite.errorServiceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.

error_expired.title: Invitation expired
error_expired.body: This invitation has expired. Please contact the person who invited you to get a new one.

error_revoked.title: Invitation revoked
error_revoked.body: This invitation has been revoked. Please contact the person who invited you if this is a mistake.

error_already_accepted.title: Account already activated
error_already_accepted.body: This account has already been activated. Sign in to continue.

workplaces.empty: No workplaces yet for this company.

workplaces.deleteConfirmWithAssignments: Workplace {name} has assigned employees. Deleting it will automatically end their assignments. Continue?
